key.name: widgets-config
key.description: JSON-encoded list of widget entries, each with an "id" and "enabled" flag. Array order determines stacking order on the desktop.

key.name: widget-style
key.description: "list" shows one row per device with a small battery icon. "circles" shows an iOS-battery-widget-style row of circular percentage rings.

key.name: weather-api-key
key.description: User-supplied API key for the weather widget.

key.name: weather-location
key.description: City name or lat,lon used to query the weather API.

key.name: photos-api-key-plain
key.summary: Fallback plaintext storage for the Immich API key (used only if libsecret is unavailable)

key.name: photos-slide-interval-seconds
key.summary: Seconds between photo changes in the slideshow

key.name: storage-mount-path
key.summary: Filesystem path to report storage usage for

key.name: container-anchor
key.summary: Screen corner the widget stack anchors to

key.name: container-margin-x
key.summary: Horizontal margin from the screen edge, in pixels

key.name: container-margin-y
key.summary: Vertical margin from the screen edge, in pixels

key.name: widget-spacing
key.summary: Vertical spacing between stacked widgets, in pixels

key.name: column-spacing
key.summary: Horizontal spacing between overflow columns, in pixels

key.name: github-username
key.summary: GitHub username used for PR queries and the contribution heatmap

key.name: github-token-plain
key.summary: Fallback plaintext storage for the GitHub token (used only if libsecret is unavailable)

key.name: calendar-week-start
key.summary: First day of the week shown in the calendar widget

key.name: quicklaunch-pinned-apps
key.summary: JSON array of pinned .desktop app IDs shown first in the Quick Launch widget
